requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority Approval
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——以色列国家消防救援局批准
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——以色列國家消防救援局批准

summary.en: The Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority is the fire authority having jurisdiction for fire-safety requirements in Israel, alongside building-permit and local-authority processes. Stationary BESS installations should be treated as high-risk electrical and lithium-battery installations requiring project-specific fire-safety review before commissioning. The review may require fire-risk analysis, thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation, firefighting access, emergency shutdown, separation distances, signage, and integration with building fire systems. Where Israeli Standards or project specifications adopt IEC 62933-5-2, the system-level safety file should align with that standard. Fire authority approval is a separate project gate from SII certification and grid connection.
summary.zh: 以色列国家消防救援局是以色列消防安全要求的主管机关，同时还涉及建筑许可和地方主管机关流程。固定式BESS装置应视为高风险电气和锂电池装置，在投运前需要项目专属消防安全审查。审查可能要求火灾风险分析、热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风、消防通道、紧急停机、隔离距离、标识以及与建筑消防系统联动。若以色列标准或项目规格采纳IEC 62933-5-2，系统级安全文件应与该标准保持一致。消防主管机关批准是独立于SII认证和并网的项目门槛。
summary.zht: 以色列國家消防救援局是以色列消防安全要求的主管機關，同時還涉及建築許可和地方主管機關流程。固定式BESS裝置應視為高風險電氣和鋰電池裝置，在投運前需要項目專屬消防安全審查。審查可能要求火災風險分析、熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風、消防通道、緊急停機、隔離距離、標識以及與建築消防系統聯動。若以色列標準或項目規格採納IEC 62933-5-2，系統級安全文件應與該標準保持一致。消防主管機關批准是獨立於SII認證和併網的項目門檻。

standards_or_laws: Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority — installation fire-safety approval and fire authority review
Local building-permit and authority approval process — project-specific gate for stationary BESS installations
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements for electrochemical-based systems where referenced by Israeli Standards or project specifications

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through product standards, system standards, and project-level fire review. Common China-side evidence may include GB/T 36558-2023 system documentation, GB/T 34120-2023 grid-related documentation, NB/T 42090-2016 PCS test evidence, battery safety reports, and local Chinese fire-review records. These documents do not replace Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority approval or Israeli building / installation review.
summary.zh: 中国通过产品标准、系统标准和项目级消防审查管理BESS消防安全。常见中国侧证据可能包括GB/T 36558-2023系统文件、GB/T 34120-2023并网相关文件、NB/T 42090-2016 PCS测试证据、电池安全报告及中国当地消防审查记录。这些文件不能替代以色列国家消防救援局批准或以色列建筑/安装审查。
summary.zht: 中國通過產品標準、系統標準和項目級消防審查管理BESS消防安全。常見中國側證據可能包括GB/T 36558-2023系統文件、GB/T 34120-2023併網相關文件、NB/T 42090-2016 PCS測試證據、電池安全報告及中國當地消防審查記錄。這些文件不能替代以色列國家消防救援局批准或以色列建築/安裝審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese fire-safety evidence and domestic fire approvals are not accepted as Israeli installation approval. Exporters and EPCs should: (a) engage the Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority, local building authority, and a qualified Israeli fire-safety engineer at concept design stage; (b) prepare a BESS fire-safety package covering thermal runaway, detection, ventilation, suppression, emergency response, access, and separation; (c) align the system hazard analysis with IEC 62933-5-2 where referenced; and (d) confirm any site-specific requirements before container layout, HVAC, suppression, and battery-rack spacing are frozen.
gap.zh: 差距：中国消防安全证据和国内消防批准不被接受为以色列安装批准。出口商和EPC应：（a）在概念设计阶段即与以色列国家消防救援局、地方建筑主管机关及合格以色列消防安全工程师接触；（b）准备覆盖热失控、探测、通风、抑制、应急响应、通道和隔离距离的BESS消防安全文件包；（c）在被引用时使系统危害分析与IEC 62933-5-2一致；（d）在集装箱布局、HVAC、抑制系统和电池架间距冻结前确认任何现场专项要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國消防安全證據和國內消防批准不被接受為以色列安裝批准。出口商和EPC應：（a）在概念設計階段即與以色列國家消防救援局、地方建築主管機關及合格以色列消防安全工程師接觸；（b）準備覆蓋熱失控、探測、通風、抑制、應急響應、通道和隔離距離的BESS消防安全文件包；（c）在被引用時使系統危害分析與IEC 62933-5-2一致；（d）在集裝箱布局、HVAC、抑制系統和電池架間距凍結前確認任何現場專項要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory project gate — installation fire-safety approval must be confirmed with the Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority and local building authorities per site
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Israel fire-safety approval is a separate BESS installation gate. Chinese GB/T and NB/T files, and Chinese local fire approvals, do not satisfy Israel National Fire and Rescue Authority review. Confirm site-specific fire requirements early, including thermal-runaway mitigation, ventilation or gas detection, suppression, emergency shutdown, access, and separation distances before finalizing system layout.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 以色列消防安全批准是独立的BESS安装门槛。中国GB/T和NB/T文件以及中国当地消防批准不满足以色列国家消防救援局审查。请尽早确认现场专项消防要求，包括热失控缓解、通风或气体探测、抑制系统、紧急停机、消防通道和隔离距离，再最终确定系统布局。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 以色列消防安全批准是獨立的BESS安裝門檻。中國GB/T和NB/T文件以及中國當地消防批准不滿足以色列國家消防救援局審查。請儘早確認現場專項消防要求，包括熱失控緩解、通風或氣體探測、抑制系統、緊急停機、消防通道和隔離距離，再最終確定系統布局。
